stories.title: Wembanyama Tops MVP Ladder, Passes SGA

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
WEMBY IS No. 1.

Victor Wembanyama just jumped to the top of the Kia MVP Ladder, passing SGA.

17 blocks in 3 games. Spurs at 54-18. The case is overwhelming.

Who gets your MVP vote? 👇

#HoopHeroes #NBA #WembyMVP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
SGA broke Wilt's record. Wemby blocks 17 shots in 3 games.

This MVP race is the best debate in sports right now.

Thunder 57-15. Spurs 54-18. No wrong answer — just sides.

#HoopHeroes #NBA #MVPRace

article.headline: Wembanyama Tops MVP Ladder, Surpasses Shai Gilgeous-Alexander

stories.title: Luka 41 Pts, Lakers Beat Nets Without LeBron

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
LeBron out. Luka unbothered.

41 PTS. 6 threes. Lakers win.

Doncic is averaging 39.5 PPG over his last 11 games. The most unstoppable scorer alive.

Is this officially Luka's team? #LakeShow #HoopHeroes #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
60 pts. 50 pts. 41 pts.

That's Luka Doncic's last month of basketball.

With LeBron banged up, the Lakers need him to keep this up all the way to June.

#HoopHeroes #LakeShow #NBA

article.headline: Luka Drops 41 as Lakers Beat Nets Without LeBron

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
KD drops 25 and 10. Rockets stay alive at 43-28.

But the real story: Grizzlies rookie Olivier-Maxence Prosper lit up for a CAREER-HIGH 31 pts.

Remember that name. 🔥

#HoopHeroes #NBA #Rockets

stories.title: Warriors 131, Wizards 126 — Golden State Fights for Play-In

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Warriors 131, Wizards 126.

Golden State barely survived the league's worst team to hold their Play-In spot.

At 36-36, every game is a must-win.

The dynasty era feels very far away. #HoopHeroes #NBA #Warriors

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
It's over for Chicago.

The Bulls have been officially ELIMINATED from playoff contention after losing 131-113 to OKC.

Thunder now 57-15. The gap between the best and the rest in the West is enormous.

#HoopHeroes #NBA #Bulls

stories.title: Playoff Picture — Knicks Fail to Clinch, Boston Leads by 2

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Knicks STILL haven't clinched.

Boston leads NY by 2 games for the No. 2 seed in the East — with 1 head-to-head left.

Clinched: Thunder. Spurs. Pistons.
Sweating: Everyone else.

#HoopHeroes #NBA #KnicksNation

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Playoff Picture

#### Image Concept 6A — Social (1080x1350)
- **Type:** Standings graphic (text-heavy design)
- **No photo needed** — pure stats/standings layout
- **Overlay Text:**
  - Headline: "EAST PLAYOFF RACE"
  - Clinched: "DET 52-19 ✓ | BOS 47-24 | NYK 47-25"
  - Fight: "TOR 40-31 | ATL 40-32 | PHI 39-33"
  - Bubble: "ORL 38-33 | MIA 38-34"
  - Footer: "2 WEEKS LEFT | #HoopHeroes"
- **Design Notes:** Color-coded by status — green for clinched, orange for safe, red for bubble

stories.title: LeBron Out With Ankle Sprain — Lakers' Injury Concern

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
LeBron James is out with an ankle sprain.

Lakers at 46-26 have 2 weeks left. They need the King healthy for the playoffs.

Luka held it down with 41 tonight — but this bears watching.

#HoopHeroes #LakeShow #NBA

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
